description_long: This object is a classic assault rifle with a distinctive wooden stock, handguard, and pistol grip, paired with a matte black metal receiver and barrel assembly. The rifle features a curved detachable magazine, typical of the AK-47 family, and a long, slender barrel with a simple front sight post. The wooden components have a warm, natural finish, contrasting with the dark, industrial look of the metal parts. The receiver is boxy and robust, with visible details such as the trigger, magazine release, and safety selector. The front and rear iron sights are aligned along the top of the barrel and receiver, providing basic aiming functionality. The overall design is utilitarian, rugged, and instantly recognizable as a military-style firearm.
description: A classic assault rifle with a wooden stock, handguard, and grip, combined with a black metal receiver, barrel, and curved magazine. The design is robust and utilitarian, with iron sights and a long barrel.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the front, showing the narrow profile of the barrel and the alignment of the wooden stock and handguard.
description_view_1: A clear side view reveals the full length of the rifle, including the wooden stock, handguard, pistol grip, curved magazine, and iron sights.
description_view_2: The rifle is viewed from the rear, highlighting the slim profile of the stock and the alignment of the barrel and receiver.
description_view_3: The opposite side view displays the same features as view 1, with the wooden components and magazine visible, but from the other side.
